title: Approval Item
description: Schema for a single approval queue item. Based on the approval policy and runtime Task 4 (approval queue foundation).

approval_id.description: Unique identifier for this approval item.

project_id.description: Unique project identifier this approval applies to.

target_system.description: Target system for the action (jira, github, email, slack, etc.).

target_id.description: Identifier of the target entity in the target system (issue ID, PR number, etc.).

summary.description: Brief summary of the action requiring approval.

requested_by.description: Agent or user who requested this approval.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the approval was requested.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the approval was last updated.

details.description: Freeform detail about the action requiring approval.

audit_ref.description: Reference to the audit record that generated this approval item.

review_notes.description: Notes from the reviewer or approver.

decided_by.description: Who made the approval decision (user ID or name).

decided_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the decision was made.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp or descriptive string when this approval expires.

scope.description: Scope of the approval (single action, similar actions, or entire workflow run).
